_description: Styled dashboard/layout XUI components for semantic Vibe AI app generation.
_core_rules: Use XDashboard components for styled application layouts when available.
Use real XDashboard _type names: card, grid, navlist, badge, table, modal, toast, divider, stack, kpi-card, scroll, spacer, toolbar, empty, igroup, search, select, field, drawer, sidebar, xsection.
Use xsection for dashboard sections because XUI core reserves section as an HTML tag.
Do NOT use raw style or class unless explicitly requested.
Generated apps may include _theme as "light", "dark", or a token object.
Do NOT generate CSS frameworks, Tailwind, Bootstrap, React, Vue, or HTML documents.
_priority_rules: For modern app screens, use _type:"stack" or _type:"xsection" inside root _type:"view".
For styled apps, prefer dashboard components: xsection > stack > card > field.
For forms, wrap inputs in card and use field when possible.
Use primitive xui-core controls like label, text, textarea, and button inside dashboard containers.
_anti_patterns: Using raw div/style layout when stack/card/xsection can express it.
Using xsection instead of section for dashboard sections.
Using xselect instead of selectfor dashboard dropdowns.
Using x-card, x-stack, x-grid, or x-kpi-card as _type names.
